overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a historic city resembling New Orleans. The character navigates cobblestone streets, passes by brick buildings with wrought iron balconies, and encounters pedestrians, horse-drawn carriages, and a trolley during golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: brick planter walkway in historic district

events.description: turns left at corner of building with arched windows

agents.ego_description: walking along brick planter wall and turning left at corner, passing a woman in blue dress

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking along the brick wall

entered.detail: low brick wall with tropical plants on top, running along the sidewalk
weathered blue building with arched windows and decorative trim
simple wooden bench on the sidewalk near the building corner
colorful poster on the building wall advertising a circus

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk beside a brick planter wall with tropical vegetation. The camera follows as the character turns left at a corner, revealing a weathered blue historic building with arched windows and a wooden bench. A woman in a blue dress walks along the wall in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with muddy cobblestones

events.description: crosses from sidewalk onto muddy street near D. LaFauche building
enters covered sidewalk area with awnings and wrought iron balconies

agents.ego_description: crossing the muddy cobblestone street and walking past wooden carts and barrels, passing NPCs on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: man leaning against building with arms crossed, observing the street

entered.detail: tall brick building with 'D. LaFauche' signage and 'The Hayre Market' on the ground floor
empty wooden push cart on the sidewalk
stacked wooden barrels near the building entrance
covered walkway with overhead awning providing shade

segments.scene_description: The character crosses onto a muddy cobblestone street in front of the D. LaFauche building, passing wooden carts and barrels. The scene transitions into a covered sidewalk area with overhead awnings. Pedestrians are scattered along the street, and a man leans against a building with his arms crossed.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with wrought iron balconies and storefronts

events.description: turns right at corner intersection onto street with trolley tracks

agents.ego_description: walking under covered awnings past sitting NPCs and turning corner onto trolley street

notable_agents.action: man sitting on wooden crate near building entrance

entered.detail: red brick building with white trim and multiple windows
ornate black street lamp post with hanging sign
building with blue awning at the street corner
metal trolley tracks embedded in the cobblestone street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk with wrought iron balconies overhead, passing a man sitting on a crate. The lighting is mixed with shadows from the awnings. At the corner, the character turns right onto a street with visible trolley tracks, passing ornate street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: trolley street with tracks and commercial buildings

events.description: trolley car passes by on the left side of the street
horse-drawn carriage crosses the street ahead from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking along trolley tracks as trolley passes and observing horse-drawn carriage crossing

notable_agents.action: trolley car moving along tracks passing the character
horse-drawn carriage crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: dark colored trolley with 'Pacific Union' text and red stripes
red building with green shutters and 'Rooms for Rent' signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open street with trolley tracks as a large trolley car passes by on the left. The scene features commercial buildings on both sides including a red building with 'Rooms for Rent' signage. A horse-drawn carriage crosses the muddy street ahead, and overhead utility wires crisscross the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic city district, transitioning from a narrow, vegetated sidewalk into a bustling commercial street. It begins beside a brick planter wall with tropical greenery, following the character as they turn a corner past a weathered blue building and a passing woman in a blue dress. As the character steps onto a muddy cobblestone street, the open air shifts into a covered sidewalk area filled with wooden carts, barrels, and leaning pedestrians. The scene then moves beneath the shadow of wrought iron balconies and ornate street lamps before turning right onto a wider thoroughfare marked by trolley tracks. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal a large trolley car passing by and a horse-drawn carriage crossing the street beneath a web of overhead utility wires and commercial signage.
